person_name: Numenius of Apamea (Pythagorean philosopher, 2nd century CE)
person_name_full: Numenius of Apamea (Pythagorean philosopher, 2nd century CE)
notes: Pythagorean philosopher from Apamea, known for his eloquence and impartiality, active in the 2nd century CE.

docs.title: Contra Celsum, Book 1
docs.author: Origen
docs.excerpt: … has given many proofs of being a very eloquent man, and who has carefully tested many opinions, and collected together from many sources what had the appearance of truth ; for, in the first book of his treatise On the Good , speaking of those nations who have adopted the opinion that God is
